title: So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I
description: Agreement expressions. When to say 'So do I / Me too / Neither do I / Me neither' and what they really mean.
summary_pt_br: Como concordar em inglês. Afirmativa: So + auxiliar + sujeito ('So do I', 'So am I'). Me too (informal). Negativa: Neither + auxiliar + sujeito ('Neither do I'). Me neither (informal). Nunca 'Me too' em frase negativa.

scenes.text_en:
'I love tacos,' said Rafa.
'SO DO I,' said Bia. 'ME TOO,' said Maya. Same meaning.
'I don't like lukewarm coffee,' said Joca.
'NEITHER DO I,' said Zara. 'ME NEITHER,' said Rafa. Same again.
But if you mix them up, you sound funny.
scenes.text_pt:
'Eu amo taco,' disse o Rafa.
'EU TAMBÉM' (formal: SO DO I / informal: ME TOO), disseram Bia e Maya.
'Não gosto de café morno,' disse o Joca.
'NEM EU' (formal: NEITHER DO I / informal: ME NEITHER), disseram Zara e Rafa.
Misturar = soar estranho.

scenes.title: Formula — match the auxiliary
scenes.body_en: SO / NEITHER + auxiliary + subject. The auxiliary matches the original verb: 'I am' → So AM I / Neither AM I. 'I have' → So HAVE I. 'I eat' → So DO I. 'I went' → So DID I. 'I will' → So WILL I. TRAP: NEVER say 'Me too' after a negative ('I don't eat meat. Me too' = WRONG; say 'Me neither').
scenes.body_pt: Formula: SO/NEITHER + auxiliar + sujeito. Auxiliar bate com o verbo original: 'I am' → So am I. 'I eat' → So do I. 'I will' → So will I. PEGADINHA: Nunca 'Me too' depois de negativa. 'I don't like it → Me neither' (certo) ou 'Neither do I' (certo). 'Me too' aí é errado.

examples.en: I play guitar → So do I.
I can't swim → Neither can I.

exercise.question: 'I can't swim.' → '___.' (agree)
exercise.explanation: Negative agreement formal = NEITHER + matching auxiliary. 'Can't' → 'Neither CAN I'.

pairs: I love it → So do I
I don't like it → Neither do I
I am happy → So am I
I can sing → So can I
exercise.explanation: Five patterns. The auxiliary always mirrors the original.

exercise.question: Complete: "So do I. I ___ it too."
exercise.explanation: The full phrase is: "So do I. I love it too."

exercise.question: Pick the best response. (NEITHER DO I.)
exercise.explanation: The correct response is: "Neither do I."

scenes.title: Finding common ground
scenes.pt_summary: Concordância — so do I, me too, neither do I, me neither.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I love surfing at Praia do Sol.
turns.pt: Adoro surfar em Praia do Sol.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: So do I. I love it too.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I am learning English this year.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Me too. I started in January.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: I don't have time to study every day.
turns.pt: Não tenho tempo de estudar todo dia.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: So can I. I swim every morning.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: We have a lot in common!

scenes.title: Listening story — So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça a situação com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que você entendeu — resumo, detalhes, seus pensamentos. O professor vai ler e comentar.
scenes.prompt_en: Write in English what you heard. A short summary is fine. Mention who spoke, what they said, and what you think about the situation.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que você ouviu. Pode ser um resumo curto. Diga quem falou, o que disseram e o que você achou.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: In this story, we meet Classmate and a student. Agreement expressions. When to say 'So do I / Me too / Neither do I / Me neither' and what they really mean. Listen carefully and think about what each person says.

paragraphs.speaker: Classmate
paragraphs.en: I love surfing at Praia do Sol.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: So do I. I love it too.

paragraphs.speaker: Classmate
paragraphs.en: I am learning English this year.

paragraphs.speaker: The student
paragraphs.en: Me too. I started in January.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: That is the end of our short scene with Classmate. Think about what you heard and how the conversation felt.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the class just finished "So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I". Agreement expressions. When to say 'So do I / Me too / Neither do I / Me neither' and what they really mean. Mr. Kumar reminded the students that practice is the key — listen, read aloud, write your own examples. Every small step adds up. The ocean in Praia do Sol keeps moving, and so does your English.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is the key to learning?
check.explanation: Practice — listen, read aloud, write your own examples.
check.hint_pt_br: A chave é a prática: ouvir, ler em voz alta, escrever seus próprios exemplos.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in class we studied "So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I". I liked it because it was clear and short. Tomorrow we will practice again. See you then!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
options: A grammar rule about the past
So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I
check.explanation: She says: "Today in class we studied 'So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I'".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala claramente o título: "So Do I, Me Too, Neither Do I".

scenes.title: Go deeper — free resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes gratuitas e confiáveis para você estudar mais. Salve os links e volte sempre.
